<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Controller\ArgumentResolver; use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request; use Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Controller\ValueResolverInterface; use Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\ControllerMetadata\ArgumentMetadata; /** * Yields a variadic argument's values from the request attributes. * * @author Iltar van der Berg <kjarli@gmail.com> */ final class VariadicValueResolver implements ValueResolverInterface { public function resolve(Request $request, ArgumentMetadata $argument): array { if (!$argument->isVariadic() || !$request->attributes->has($argument->getName())) { return []; } $values = $request->attributes->get($argument->getName()); if (!\is_array($values)) { throw new \InvalidArgumentException(\sprintf('The action argument "...$%1$s" is required to be an array, the request attribute "%1$s" contains a type of "%2$s" instead.', $argument->getName(), get_debug_type($values))); } return $values; } }
